note: Discoverable cross-domain combination recipes. Each braids TWO abilities from different domains into a third effect neither reaches alone (skill_functions.json doctrine). Extends the SNG-010 emergence-recipe engine. DISCOVERABILITY: recipes are found by USE (pairing the two abilities in a beat surfaces the braid as a discovery, logged to the codex + narrativeLog), by a rune-cast/Attention read that hints a latent braid, or by a teacher who knows it. `discovery` field says how each is found. Owning both parts is the gate (class-cost/capacity prices the breadth; this is the payoff). Authored by Aevi (PO) — a starter set; generative braids (SNG-020) extend it in-grain.

recipes.name: The Warding Peace
recipes.effect: A light-bound truce-field: violence cannot be RAISED within it, not merely blocked. The cause of harm is forbidden, lit and held.
recipes.cannot: Holds only while sustained; a will already committed to violence strains it; does not stop harm from outside the field.
recipes.discovery: use — shield + de-escalate together in one beat; or taught at the Marchward

recipes.name: The Unseen Cut
recipes.effect: A decisive strike from a direction that was never there — the disciplined kill delivered through concealment. Violence carried on shadow.
recipes.cannot: Total light defeats the concealment; one strike, then you're seen; the Edge's honor-forms frown on it (a Redline reputation cost).
recipes.discovery: use — strike from concealment; or an Umbral assassin's teaching

recipes.name: The Mercy-Knowing
recipes.effect: The holder of both life and death can KNOW, truly, whether a body should be pulled back or let go — and do either rightly. The Quiet-in-the-Quickwood as a skill.
recipes.cannot: Knowing is not commanding the outcome the world allows; the most sacred and most terrible braid — it will not lie to you about which mercy is called for.
recipes.discovery: use — hold both traditions and attend a dying thing; the braid surfaces itself. The rarest teaching, held by few.
recipes.note: Same-domain poles (life+death) rather than two domains — the co-firing braid; the exception that proves combination is about POLES not just packs.

recipes.name: The Meaning-Engine
recipes.effect: A machine commanded by WHY, not just HOW — a Precursor work run by significance. The only way to truly treat with What Sleeps Under, which is both mechanism and meaning.
recipes.cannot: Requires dense substrate; the machine still obeys its physics, only now also its meaning; What Sleeps Under may answer, and answering is its own peril.
recipes.discovery: use at a deep Precursor site holding both; or Ledda / the Deep Warden may hint it
recipes.note: The braid the deep arc is built around.

recipes.name: The Riding Order
recipes.effect: Unmake a structure and re-bind its pieces mid-collapse into what you need — chaos and order in one motion. The Living-Lattice jewel as a technique.
recipes.cannot: The window is a heartbeat; miss the re-bind and you've only made chaos; drifts both poles at once, exhausting.
recipes.discovery: use — break and bind in the same beat; learned at the Living Lattice

recipes.name: The Whole Act
recipes.effect: Body and mind as one instrument — thought and motion stop being separate; you act faster than either could decide. The Middle Way's ideal made a skill.
recipes.cannot: Both must be trained near-equally; a body-heavy or mind-heavy wielder gets a lesser version; the extremes (Temple, Cogitarium) cannot do it at all.
recipes.discovery: use — hold both near-equal and act under pressure; taught at the Middle Way

recipes.name: The Sounding
recipes.effect: Ring a place and READ what rings back — map a location's whole pole-disposition and hidden co-firings at once. Resonance as sonar for the coordinate-world.
recipes.cannot: Loud — announces you; reveals disposition, not intent; a dead-silent (origin-flat) place returns nothing.
recipes.discovery: use — resonate then perceive; a Heights rune-reader's trick

recipes.name: The Harbored Flame
recipes.effect: A hidden sanctuary of restoring light — conceal a place so well it can't be found, and fill it with healing radiance the dark would otherwise forbid. Shelter AND mending in one.
recipes.cannot: The two poles fight — sustaining both is costly; a searcher who brings their own light can crack it.
recipes.discovery: use — conceal + heal a hidden space; an Umbral healer's craft

recipes.name: The Rooted Stand
recipes.effect: Life poured through a trained body — stand unbroken, healing as fast as you're hurt, rooted like the Quickwood itself. The warrior-warden's braid.
recipes.cannot: The overgrowth risk of Quickening plus the body's true limit — push too far and you grow WRONG; energy-hungry.
recipes.discovery: use — heal and endure together; a Flesh-Temple / Quickwood crossing

recipes.name: The True Word
recipes.effect: Attend a truth so fully and tell it so well that it BINDS — a story that, once spoken, cannot be unbelieved because it is simply true and simply told. The counter to the Cathedral of Convincing.
recipes.cannot: Only works on the actually-true; a beautiful lie breaks it; the Stillhold's buried truths resist being said.
recipes.discovery: use — reveal by attention + tell by story; the Wend keepers and the Numen both hold pieces

recipes.name: The Perfect Form
recipes.effect: A fight conducted like a proof — every strike lawful, every opening foreseen; the Marcher's duel as living structure.
recipes.cannot: Wildcraft unravels it; a truly chaotic foe breaks the proof.
recipes.discovery: taught at the Redline; or use — strike + bind in the forms

recipes.name: The Unraveling Blow
recipes.effect: A strike that lands where the plan broke — damage scales with the disorder you made first.
recipes.cannot: Against the truly formless there is no plan to break.
recipes.discovery: use — break a plan, then strike into it; Churn-taught

recipes.name: The Immovable Calm
recipes.effect: A guard that de-escalates — attacks are absorbed and somehow the fight is over; the Temple Guardian's signature.
recipes.cannot: Cannot pursue; the guard ends fights, doesn't win wars.
recipes.discovery: taught at the Flesh-Temple; or use — brace + de-escalate together

recipes.name: The Foregone Conclusion
recipes.effect: Out-model an opponent so completely their attack fails before it starts — the War-Thinker's checkmate.
recipes.cannot: The model is only as good as its inputs; wild luck defeats clean prediction.
recipes.discovery: Cogitarium-taught; or use — model then bind

recipes.name: The Grasping Green
recipes.effect: Roots bind the foe while living growth mends you mid-fight — attrition the green always wins. The Thorn-Warden's (and the Ent's) signature.
recipes.cannot: Needs earth; fire changes the equation entirely.
recipes.discovery: Deepwood Walkers teach it; or use — root-hold + heal in one fight

recipes.name: The Judging Beam
recipes.effect: A strike that reveals as it burns — illusions die first, then the target's cover. The Blaze-Lance signature.
recipes.cannot: What is truly as it appears takes only the burn.
recipes.discovery: Plateau-taught; or use — reveal + strike as one beam

recipes.name: The Quiet End
recipes.effect: A strike that concludes — against the dying, the raging, the unnatural, it simply finishes what was already ending. The Pale Reaper's mercy.
recipes.cannot: Cannot end what is whole and healthy — it concludes, never murders.
recipes.discovery: Ashwarden-taught, rarely; or use — ease + still in violence

discoverability.byUse: Pairing the two parts in a single beat surfaces the braid as a DISCOVERY — logged to codex + narrativeLog, thereafter a known technique. This is the primary path: players FIND combinations by trying things, and the world remembers they found them.
discoverability.byReading: A rune-cast or True Attention on a scene/self can hint a LATENT braid available to the wielder ('these two of yours want to be one') — discovery via the read.
discoverability.byTeaching: Masters know braids; a teacher (named in each recipe's discovery) can grant one directly, at a price or a bond.
discoverability.generative: SNG-020 can author a NEW braid in-grain when a player creatively pairs two owned abilities no authored recipe covers — validated, persisted, added to the discoverable set. The recipe list GROWS through play.
discoverability.engineTie: Recipes carry `parts` (the two ability ids), `functions`, `domains`, `discovery`. The engine: on a two-ability beat, check for a matching recipe (authored or generate one); gate on owning both; surface + persist the discovery. Extends emergence-recipes (SNG-010). Flagged to SNG-026.
